understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to guide a pushable object onto a goal tile (marked by '+') by navigating selectable player pieces, pushing blocks if needed, and using the given step budget efficiently.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifted the selected player exactly one cell at a time in cardinal directions, with actions only succeeding if not blocked by walls or blocks. Some objects (blocks) could be pushed if directly adjacent in the movement direction, and switching control between player pieces was accomplished with CLICK actions targeting their pixel-based coordinates. Walls blocked movement as expected, and selectable pieces could be switched by clicking on any of their positions in the grid.
